title: 2 pack Folding Water Container, 5L+10L Outdoor Folding Water Bag Car Water Carrier Container for Sport Camping Hiking Picnic BBQ Water Resistant Gift
features: ✔ Collapsible water bag: 2 sizes in the pack, 10L (15.1 x 16.3 inches / 38.5 x 41.5 cm) and 5L (11.81 x 12.99 inches / 30 x 33 cm), you can have both at the same time.
✔ Suitable for food: BPA-free, safe and non-toxic, made from Gourde and polyethylene.
✔ SAVE SPACE: Folds flat when not in use and stands up when full. The drinking water bag can stand on the floor without falling, and takes up little space when empty.
✔ Easy to use and carry: Large filling opening for quick filling.
✔ WIDE APPLICATION Perfect for camping, vacation, hiking, hunting, travel, car, picnics, BBQ, etc. The foldable water bag is the best choice for everyone.
description: Product Description 2 Packs 5L +10L Water Tank Container Bag, BPA Free Outdoor Folding Water Storage Carrier for Backpacking Camping Hiking Picnic BBQ Emergencies Tired of bulky water bottles taking up too much space in your homes and when you go outdoors? Water is our most essential need in everyday life. The human body requires an appropriate amount of water intake to function properly and survive. We do our best to make sure that we fulfill this need as we lug around water bottles. This is a good practice, although carrying a bottle takes up too much needed space that we could have used to bring other necessities. Not to mention, plastic containers that poses danger to humans and the environment. The Collapsible Water Container by ariel-gxr provides you with a safe and healthy alternative without the added bulk and expense. Self-reliance After the bottom of the can upright filled with water,easy to carry handle, after the water had emptied, it can be foled up to him, put into the bag. ​Perfect design Large screw cap closure with handle and wide bottle lip,it's easy to use and clean. Ice hot bag Before freezing, filled with water should not exceed 3/4 of the volume, to avoid being frozen bursting, homemade ice when needed ice can cut the bag. Large-diameter Water Injection Port Fit for pregnant and baby Available for Re-usage Available for Cold Storage Portable Water Container - Wear-resistant handle, easy to carry, will not hurt your hand - Easy to fold and unfold, save space and easy to carry - Foldable and light-weight, a perfect outdoor drinking tool Specification: Material: PE Color: blue TWO kinds of capacity: 5L (11.81 x 12.8 inch, unfolded without water) 10L (14.96 x 16.14 inch ,unfolded without water) you can have two sizes in one time, good for you use on different occasions. Temperature range: 0℃ to 80℃
